nodes.name: initial-coagent-state.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the initial CopilotKit CoAgent state by seeding EdPath graph state and projecting it to the public, firewall-safe CoAgent shape.

nodes.name: createInitialCoAgentState
nodes.summary: Constructs the initial CoAgent state from a fresh EdPath graph state, applying the public projection that strips answer keys.

nodes.name: app.ts
nodes.summary: Assembles the Express application: CORS, JSON parsing, health check, the /upload and /start routes, and the mounted CopilotKit runtime endpoint.
nodes.languageNotes: Factory function returns a configured Express app for testability rather than a module-level singleton.

nodes.name: createApp
nodes.summary: Wires up an Express app with CORS, body parsing, health and feature routes, and mounts the CopilotKit runtime handler.

nodes.name: env.ts
nodes.summary: Centralized, validated environment configuration for the backend (ports, upload limits, OpenAI and LangSmith settings) plus feature-detection helpers.

nodes.name: isOpenAiConfigured
nodes.summary: Reports whether an OpenAI API key is present in the resolved environment configuration.

nodes.name: isLangSmithTracingEnabled
nodes.summary: Reports whether LangSmith tracing is enabled based on the presence of a LangSmith API key.

nodes.name: edpath-langgraph-agent.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the EdPathLangGraphAgent bridge, verifying state snapshot handling and stream preparation against the LangGraph deployment client.

nodes.name: edpath-langgraph-agent.ts
nodes.summary: Custom CopilotKit LangGraphAgent subclass that bridges the LangGraph dev server to the UI, normalizing state snapshots streamed back to CoAgent clients.

nodes.name: EdPathLangGraphAgent
nodes.summary: Extends CopilotKit's LangGraphAgent to fetch thread state from the deployment client and shape state snapshots for the CoAgent UI stream.

nodes.name: runtime.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests exercising the CopilotKit runtime endpoint mounted on the Express app.

nodes.name: runtime.ts
nodes.summary: Constructs the CopilotKit Runtime that registers the EdPath LangGraph agent and exposes it as an Express endpoint for the frontend CoAgent bridge.

nodes.name: createEdPathCopilotKitRuntime
nodes.summary: Builds and returns the CopilotKit runtime Express endpoint, registering the EdPath agent with its seeded initial CoAgent state.

nodes.name: sync-langsmith-dataset.ts
nodes.summary: CLI script that syncs local eval scenarios into a LangSmith dataset, creating the dataset and uploading examples for offline evaluation.

nodes.name: findOrCreateDataset
nodes.summary: Looks up an existing LangSmith dataset by name or creates one when absent.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that guards on tracing config, resolves the dataset, and pushes each eval case as a LangSmith example.

nodes.name: start.route.ts
nodes.summary: Express route for POST /start: validates the thread id, processes the uploaded PDF, and seeds a new LangGraph lesson thread, mapping domain errors to HTTP status codes.

nodes.name: startHandler
nodes.summary: Handles the /start request: validates thread id, runs upload processing and lesson seeding, and translates errors into 400/409/503 responses.

nodes.name: start.service.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for startLesson covering thread-id validation, upload rejection propagation, deployment errors, and already-started conflicts.

nodes.name: start.service.ts
nodes.summary: Orchestrates lesson start: validates the thread id, processes the PDF upload, builds initial graph state, and seeds the LangGraph thread with it.

nodes.name: isValidThreadId
nodes.summary: Validates a thread id string against the allowed identifier pattern.

nodes.name: startLesson
nodes.summary: Validates input, processes the uploaded PDF, builds the initial EdPath state, and seeds a fresh LangGraph lesson thread with the snapshot.

nodes.name: InvalidThreadIdError
nodes.summary: Domain error signaling a malformed thread id, mapped to an HTTP 400 by the route.

nodes.name: build-initial-state.ts
nodes.summary: Constructs the initial EdPath LangGraph state object from a successful upload result, embedding cleaned pdfText as the grounding source.

nodes.name: buildInitialEdPathState
nodes.summary: Assembles the initial graph state (pdfText, metadata, phase defaults) from an upload result to seed a lesson.

nodes.name: pdf-clean.ts
nodes.summary: Normalizes raw extracted PDF text (line endings, whitespace, blank lines) and estimates its token cost for downstream prompt-budget checks.

nodes.name: cleanPdfText
nodes.summary: Cleans raw PDF text by normalizing newlines, collapsing whitespace, trimming lines, and removing excess blank lines.

nodes.name: estimateTokens
nodes.summary: Estimates token count from a character count using a fixed chars-per-token ratio.

nodes.name: pdf-extract.ts
nodes.summary: Extracts text from a PDF buffer using pdfjs-dist, concatenating per-page text and classifying extraction failures into typed error kinds.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pdfjs-dist page iteration and narrows text items via a `str in item` type guard.

nodes.name: classifyPdfJsError
nodes.summary: Maps a pdfjs-dist error to a domain error kind (corrupt, encrypted, or generic) by inspecting its name and message.

nodes.name: extractPdfText
nodes.summary: Loads a PDF buffer, iterates pages to collect text content, and throws a classified PdfExtractionError on failure.

nodes.name: PdfExtractionError
nodes.summary: Typed error carrying a `kind` discriminator describing why PDF text extraction failed.

nodes.name: test-fixtures.ts
nodes.summary: Shared test fixtures providing base64-encoded valid, no-text-layer, corrupt, and non-PDF buffers for upload and start tests.

nodes.name: upload-middleware.ts
nodes.summary: Multer-based upload middleware plus helpers to build size limits, validate the Zod upload result before sending, and translate multer errors into structured responses.

nodes.name: buildUploadLimits
nodes.summary: Derives upload size and page/char limits from environment configuration for the upload pipeline.

nodes.name: createUploadMiddleware
nodes.summary: Creates the multer single-file, memory-storage middleware bound to the configured binary size limit.

nodes.name: sendUploadResult
nodes.summary: Zod-validates an upload result at the boundary and writes it as a 200 JSON response.

nodes.name: uploadErrorHandler
nodes.summary: Express error middleware translating multer file-size and upload errors into structured 400 rejection responses.

nodes.name: upload.route.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the POST /upload route covering valid PDFs, oversized files, and non-PDF rejections against the Express app.

nodes.name: upload.route.ts
nodes.summary: Express route for POST /upload: runs the multer middleware, processes the PDF via the upload service, and returns a validated upload result.

nodes.name: uploadHandler
nodes.summary: Handles the /upload request by processing the buffered file through the upload service and returning the validated result or an error response.

nodes.name: upload.service.test.ts
nodes.summary: Exhaustive unit tests for processUpload covering filename sanitization, size and page limits, PDF magic-byte checks, extraction failures, and token budgeting.

nodes.name: upload.service.ts
nodes.summary: Core upload pipeline: sanitizes the filename, enforces size/magic-byte/page/token limits, extracts and cleans PDF text, and returns a validated upload result or typed rejection.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a discriminated result type with a `reject` helper to return structured rejections instead of throwing across all validation branches.

nodes.name: processUpload
nodes.summary: Validates and processes an uploaded PDF end-to-end: size, magic bytes, extraction, cleaning, page and token limits, returning success metadata or a typed rejection.

nodes.name: upload.types.ts
nodes.summary: Local types and interfaces for the upload feature (upload input, limits, rejection reasons, and PDF metadata) used across route and service.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Process entry point that creates the Express app and starts the HTTP server listening on the configured port.

nodes.name: deployment-client.ts
nodes.summary: Wraps the LangGraph deployment SDK client to create lesson threads and seed their initial state, throwing typed errors for already-started threads and deployment failures.

nodes.name: seedLessonThread
nodes.summary: Creates a LangGraph thread for a lesson and seeds its checkpointed state, guarding against re-starting an existing thread.

nodes.name: ThreadAlreadyStartedError
nodes.summary: Typed error indicating the requested lesson thread already exists, mapped to HTTP 409 by the route.

nodes.name: LangGraphDeploymentError
nodes.summary: Typed error signaling a failure communicating with the LangGraph deployment, mapped to HTTP 503 by the route.
